{{Quote|My inventory contains the finest Aratech equipment you can find on Manaan — all of it far superior to the Czerka Corp swill the Sith are so fond of.|translated=1|Tyvark|<ref name="TOR" />}}
'''Tyvark Luowan''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] who ran a [[Tyvark Luowan's Rodian Surprises|store]] in [[Ahto City]], selling [[Aratech Repulsor Company/Legends|Aratech]] equipment during the [[Jedi Civil War]]. In [[3956 BBY]], he was on good terms with the local [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] forces, often offering prime deals or beneficial payment plans for Republic soldiers and other [[Sentience/Legends|sentients]] with well-known or obvious leanings towards the Republic.<ref name="TOR" />
